subject: [PATCH] mm/migrate_device: document folio_get requirement before frozen PMD split

reviews.author: Zi Yan
reviews.summary: Approved the fix to the logic in their suggestion and added a Reviewed-by tag.
reviews.raw_body:
On 6 Mar 2026, at 5:44, Usama Arif wrote:

> split_huge_pmd_address() with freeze=true splits a PMD migration entry
> into PTE migration entries, consuming one folio reference in the
> process.  The folio_get() before it provides this reference.
>
> Add a comment explaining this relationship and a VM_WARN_ON_ONCE to
> catch an unexpected refcount != 1 entry state.
>
> Suggested-by: Zi Yan <ziy@nvidia.com>
> Signed-off-by: Usama Arif <usama.arif@linux.dev>
> ---
>  mm/migrate_device.c | 5 +++++
>  1 file changed, 5 insertions(+)
>
Thanks for fixing the logic in my suggestion,

Reviewed-by: Zi Yan <ziy@nvidia.com>

Best Regards,
Yan, Zi

2026-03-06.patch_summary: The patch documents the requirement for a folio_get() before splitting a PMD migration entry into PTE entries, adding a comment and VM_WARN_ON_ONCE to catch unexpected refcount states.
